storyId.description: The ticket story ID this design addresses

breakpoints.description: Responsive breakpoint definitions used in responsive overrides

components.description: Top-level component nodes; nesting is expressed via children

id.description: Unique identifier. MUST match the corresponding SVG element ID and token overlay element references.

tag.description: EXISTING = use as-is. MODIFIED = needs prop/variant changes. NEW = must be created.

design_system_ref.description: Path in the design system, e.g. 'Components/Forms/SearchInput'. Omit for NEW components.

spatial_hint.description: Positioning guidance: 'Top-right, 24px margin', 'Flex-grow, centered', 'Grid col 2-4, row 1'

modification_notes.description: For MODIFIED components only: what changes are needed and why

justification.description: For NEW components only: why no existing component works

responsive.description: Breakpoint-specific property overrides. Keys are breakpoint names from the breakpoints object.

additionalProperties.description: Overrides to spatial_hint, props, or visibility at this breakpoint

aria.description: Accessibility attributes. Every interactive element MUST have at minimum a role and label.

designer_added.description: True when component added by designer in Figma (not in original manifest)

behavioral_spec_status.description: COMPLETE when behavioral specs are fully defined; INCOMPLETE for designer-added components awaiting spec authoring; PENDING for components in progress
